step_rationale: Circular RNA mediating cardiac repair and remodeling post-MI; operates at cardiomyocyte-injury endpoint.
mechanism: CircMap4k2 regulates cardiac repair processes and reduces myocardial remodeling following ischemic injury.

references.title: LCZ696 (sacubitril/valsartan mixture) promotes cardiac repair and reverses residual remodelling of surgical ventricular reconstruction in post-myocardial infarction mice by targeting circMap4k2/LIN28A/PDK1 pathway.
